{{CargoRelic
|name=Elephant Bird Egg
|class_id=20460
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=It is the egg of an extinct giant bird species, the elephant bird. It is as big as several hundred chicken eggs. A complete skeleton of a young elephant bird is preserved inside of it. It is a once-in-a-lifetime rarity.
|fame=31
|art=18
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=12
|ss1=Luck Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Lucky Eggs hatched, Snail ATK +1<br>400/400 Lucky Eggs hatched
|ss2=Luck Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Lucky Eggs hatched, Snail ATK +2<br>400/400 Lucky Eggs hatched
|ss3=Luck Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Lucky Eggs hatched, Snail ATK +3<br>400/400 Lucky Eggs hatched
|ss4=Luck Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Lucky Eggs hatched, Snail ATK +3<br>400/400 Lucky Eggs hatched
|ss7=Luck Egg hatching rate +3%<br>Per 10 Lucky Eggs hatched, Snail ATK +3<br>400/400 Lucky Eggs hatched<br> (Awakened)
}}
